subcodes.first_line: O my dear celestial daughter! [3.5s]... ...The followers of truth hold dear not only human beings but animals as well.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز ملکوتی من حیوان نظیر انسان در نزد اهل حقیقت بسیار عزیز است لهذا
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @wisdom [hikmat], @kindness to and rights of animals
